step_rationale: Cytoskeletal focal adhesion protein in thrombus platelets; anchors platelet contraction and spreading at injury site.
mechanism: MYH9 is a focal adhesion protein that mediates platelet contractility and firm adhesion to exposed collagen/vWF during coronary thrombus formation.

references.title: Proteomic characterization of human coronary thrombus in patients with ST-segment elevation acute myocardial infarction.
